# entity-card



<!-- Auto Generated Below -->


## Properties

| Property   | Attribute  | Description                                           | Type      | Default     |
| ---------- | ---------- | ----------------------------------------------------- | --------- | ----------- |
| `compact`  | `compact`  | Whether to show the card in a compact (inline) format | `boolean` | `false`     |
| `entity`   | --         | The organism entity to display                        | `Entity`  | `undefined` |
| `selected` | `selected` | Whether the card is currently selected/expanded       | `boolean` | `false`     |


## Events

| Event        | Description                      | Type                  |
| ------------ | -------------------------------- | --------------------- |
| `cardSelect` | Emitted when the card is clicked | `CustomEvent<Entity>` |
